---
title: "Engineering the Manifest-Driven Architecture"
date: 2026-03-01
category: "Architecture"
tags: ["#nextjs", "#system-design"]
read_time: "5 min"
id: "TIL-001"
related_projects: ["portfolio-os"]
related_tils: []
system_manifest: "debatreyadas.dev-v1"
contributor_avatars: ["/avatars/debatreya.png"]
---

## The Vision
The core of **debatreyadas.dev** is a decoupled sync engine. [cite_start]Instead of a static site, it acts as a consumer of external manifests [cite: 1-15].

### Math & Performance
We can define the sync efficiency using standard notation:
$$Efficiency = \frac{Total\_Repos}{Manifest\_Hits}$$

```typescript
// Antigravity's UI will use this code-block for the 'Source' window
export const syncEngine = async (id: string) => {
  const data = await fetchGitHubAPI(`/repos/${id}/contents/.debatreya`);
  return data.json();
}
